task_description: Build all remaining Phase 3 features for the enterprise CRM platform: Compliance (GDPR, SOC2), Enterprise Settings UI (SSO, RBAC, Compliance pages), Vertical Feature Modules (SLA, Auto-Assignment, Documents, Report Builder), Communication Modules (SMS, Chat, Email Tracking), Financial/Operations (Multi-Currency, Tax, E-Signature), and Sales Intelligence (Leaderboards, Territories, Hierarchy, Visitor Tracking). Each group must pass TypeScript, tests, and build after completion.
